subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1913-05-01
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that you have attained. This is our last day in Stuttgart and the first day of your entrance into the Kingdom... It is easy to enter into the Kingdom but it is difficult to remain in it firm and steadfast.
subcodes.first_line_orig: این روز آخر اقامت ماست در اسستتکارت و اول روز ورود شما در ملکوت ابهی
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @role of the Covenant in preserving unity, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @love and unity
